title: MonologueAsrResultV2
description: One ASR result built from provider-shaped speaker monologues.

lang.description: Transcript language reported by the provider adapter.

AsrElementKindV2.description: Stable vocabulary for one monologue element returned by an ASR provider.

oneOf.description: Lexical content that should become transcript tokens.

AsrElementV2.description:
One raw ASR element inside a speaker monologue.

Timing fields validated upstream by Python Pydantic models (see module docs).

end_s.description: End timestamp in seconds when the provider exposes one.

kind.description: Stable element kind selected by the worker adapter.

start_s.description: Start timestamp in seconds when the provider exposes one.

AsrMonologueV2.description: One speaker-attributed monologue returned by a provider ASR backend.

speaker.description: Stable speaker label chosen by the worker adapter.

LanguageCode3.description:
3-letter ISO 639-3 language code (e.g. `"eng"`, `"spa"`).

Construction validates that the value is exactly 3 ASCII alphabetic
characters, lowercased. Sentinel values like `"auto"` are rejected — use
[`LanguageSpec`] at boundaries where auto-detection is meaningful.
